D4 Colorimetry L4 Analyze Reference

Slicing CIELAB

slide the lightness and watch the a*b* plane fill with every displayable colour at that L*

CIELAB is a perceptual solid: lightness L* runs vertically, red-green a* and yellow-blue b* span each horizontal page. A cut at one L* shows that page.

Slide the lightness L*. The filled region is every sRGB colour at that L*, plotted on the a*b* plane; the side profile shows where the cut sits in the football-shaped solid. The boundary is ragged because the gamut is.
